caption: Static unit characteristics now fold up by default: the info panel shows just the identity block and the live lines (HP, Gait, Speed, Accel), with Attack/Defense, the panoply, body mass, and the weapon/shield/mount rows collapsed behind a 'Characteristics' toggle -- roughly seven lines shorter until expanded. The expand click is a HUD button (not scriptable by the input recorder), so the expanded state is shown as a still in the PR description.
